setup_accuracy.detail: Build instructions tested: python3.12 venv, pip install, pyinstaller command, cp dist/opendis_module all correct. Test command uses PYTHONPATH=. pattern per meshio lesson. Install instructions reference stari module lint/publish/install correctly.

schema_correctness.detail: Manifest table matches module_manifest.json exactly: 5 function keys with correct @istari: namespace, input validation_types (.dis/.bin), optional parameters (entity_id, include_raw_bytes), output file names. OS field matches agent host_os (macOS 26).

completeness.detail: README has all required sections: overview, architecture diagram, dependencies, all 5 functions with sample I/O, platform verification with real job IDs and status timelines, test summary, use cases, build/test/install instructions, project structure, manifest table, quality gates. CLAUDE.md covers build, test, key files, architecture, conventions, platform links. 340+ lines.

example_testing.detail: All sample output snippets are extracted from actual platform_test_report.json artifact content, not hand-written. ParseDISStream shows real PDU with entity_id 42.1.1. ExtractEntityStates shows real geodetic conversion (43.195N, 2.545E). AnalyzeScenario shows real combat events. ValidateDISStream shows all 5 checks passed with real detail strings.

cross_references.detail: System URL links to correct system (ab9cb5f9). Job IDs match platform_test_report.json. Artifact download link points to real artifact (a311b153). Agent ID matches test report. Digital thread stats (6 configs, 13 files, 8 README versions) from report.

newcomer_onboarding.detail: CLAUDE.md explains what the module is, how to build and test it, key files to read, architecture overview, and conventions (string parameter coercion, ECEF conversion, output format). A new engineer can orient in under 5 minutes.
